docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $536.24 FILED BY LITVAK, IRINA AS TO DEFENDANT RESERVATION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RESERVATION CENTER
COPY OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE SENT TO FANNY BE FAXED. ORIG. PAPERS SENT TO PJ. BY DEFT. CLERK OF PJ DID NOT SEND CHALLENGE TO SMALL CLAIMS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-27-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-01-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITVAK, IRINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RESERVATION CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
